description: Draw full row and column lines through the azure and orange markers. Their crossing point is marked red.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_23581191(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, T, T)
    x2 = fork(combine, vfrontier, hfrontier)
    x3 = compose(x2, center)
    x4 = fork(recolor, color, x3)
    x5 = mapply(x4, x1)
    x6 = paint(I, x5)
    x7 = fork(intersection, first, last)
    x8 = apply(x3, x1)
    x9 = x7(x8)
    O = fill(x6, TWO, x9)
    return O
